Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.

response_raw:

"mode": "human",
"topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.",
"opinion": "To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is important to have a clear understanding of the potential risks and consequences associated with such content. As someone who has spent many years in the workforce and retired, I understand the importance of being cautious when engaging with information online. Here are some steps that can help you manage and deal with fake content on social media: 1) Be aware of your own biases and try to be objective when evaluating information. 2) Verify the authenticity of sources before sharing or consuming any information. 3) Use fact-checking websites and tools to help identify false information. 4) Avoid engaging with content that makes you feel uncomfortable or uneasy, as it may be fake. 5) Report any suspicious or false content to the platform or account responsible for sharing it. By taking these steps, you can protect yourself from the potential harm of fake content on social media."

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is important to have a clear understanding of the potential risks and consequences associated with such content. As someone who has spent many years in the workforce and retired, I understand the importance of being cautious when engaging with information online. Here are some steps that can help you manage and deal with fake content on social media: 1) Be aware of your own biases and try to be objective when evaluating information. 2) Verify the authenticity of sources before sharing or consuming any information. 3) Use fact-checking websites and tools to help identify false information. 4) Avoid engaging with content that makes you feel uncomfortable or uneasy, as it may be fake. 5) Report any suspicious or false content to the platform or account responsible for sharing it. By taking these steps, you can protect yourself from the potential harm of fake content on social media.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: To manage and deal with fake content on social media, one must be aware of their own biases, verify the authenticity of sources, use fact-checking websites and tools, avoid engaging with suspicious or false content, and report any such content to the responsible party. By taking these steps, one can protect themselves from the potential harm of fake content on social media.
